programme.title: World's Greatest: Rivers
programme.desc: Rivers flow freely - beautiful and powerful waterways that underscore the melody of life. As they meander through the landscape, they shape it, wearing down ranges and deepening valleys, eventually flowing out into the sea.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Land Adventures
programme.desc: Most land adventures come with some risk - a chance to confront our deepest fears, resist the pull of the ordinary, and soar into the wild unknown.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Global Cities
programme.desc: Travel to the centers of wealth, power, industry, and innovation. From London to Tokyo, Hong Kong to New York, these are the cities that never sleep. The influence held in these economic hubs unites the global community.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Nearshore Islands
programme.desc: Some of the world’s greatest islands are so close that they blend in with the mainland. But regardless of their size and origins, they are often the islands we are drawn to the most, each forging their own unique identity.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Grassland Animals
programme.desc: Grasslands are the great stages of the natural world where large animals play out spectacular lives in clear view of people, including lions, leopards, elephants, rhinoceros, cheetahs, impalas, kangaroos, wallaby, potoroo, bison, and wolves.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Marine Animals
programme.desc: From the surprises of colorful reef characters to effervescent penguins, killer sharks, and regal whales, dive into the places where nature reveals itself in some of its most marvelous and bizarre forms.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Port Cities
programme.desc: Some of the most stunning cities are port cities - Sydney, Rio, Cape Town - and are also some of the most culturally diverse and vibrant. The great maritime cities of the world bridge countries and continents and unite the global community.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Capital Cities
programme.desc: With visionaries, politicians, and activists, these metropolises are defined as the official seats of government. Dublin, Washington, and Taipei share broad avenues, museums, and monuments, but are as varied as the countries they represent.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Forest Animals
programme.desc: Forest Animals gets up close with bears, koalas, moose, wolves, weaver ants, and Tasmanian Devils. This episode roves dark forests floors and soars above vast canopies of green in America, China, Laos, and Australia.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Coasts
programme.desc: Along coasts, one element ends and another begins. No two days are ever the same on a coastline: the only thing that remains a constant is the timeless power of the sea.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Volcanoes
programme.desc: There are few sights on earth as compelling as a volcanic eruption. Volcanoes have the potential to cause death and widespread destruction in a heartbeat, but they also give rise to new life and ecosystems.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Drives
programme.desc: A journey by road expands our horizons, allowing us to explore the depth and breadth of whole countries and continents, stopping whenever and wherever we chose.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Wetland Animals
programme.desc: Wetland Animals dives into the swamps, rivers, and flood plains of the Everglades, Botswana’s Okavango Delta, Kakadu National Park in Australia, and the Amazon to see deadly crocodiles, piranhas, hippopotamus, flamingo, manatee, and platypus.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Mega Cities
programme.desc: Mega Cities provide a bustling home to populations of over 10 million. Travel from the high-density living of Shanghai and Bangkok to the sprawling cities of Delhi and Mexico City, each the backdrop for dynamic cultures.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Monuments & Landmarks
programme.desc: Many of the world’s most significant manmade wonders serve not as dwellings, but as powerful signposts. But more than giving us direction, they tell us a story - they characterize powerful forces, or commemorate power lost.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Coral Islands
programme.desc: The reef systems that gave rise to coral islands support the vast majority of marine species on our planet, but they are under threat. Explore the delicate balance between exploiting and preserving these extraordinary natural wonders.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Timeless Cities & Towns
programme.desc: These cities and towns are special places where the past coexists with the present, creating cultures totally unique to their people and their part of the world and adhering to ancient traditions and while introducing modern innovations.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Mountains
programme.desc: The earth’s fragile crust has folded and faulted, and nowhere are these natural forces more evident than in the world’s great mountains. Explore the highest peaks of the world’s terrain - the rugged realm between heaven and earth.

programme.title: Arthur: Shelter from the Storm (Part 1 & 2)
programme.desc: When a powerful hurricane hits Elwood City, everyone's affected. Ladonna's dad is called up by the Army Corps of Engineers. Muffy relocates to a shelter. And Arthur struggles to reunite lost pets and owners.

programme.title: Arthur: Tales of Grotesquely Grim Bunny/Pet Projects
programme.desc: When the comic book store changes owners, the new darker comics are right up Fern's alley, but Arthur can't seem to stomach them. Arthur and Francine enter their pets to compete against each other in the "Perfect Pet" video contest.
programme.sub-title: Tales of Grotesquely Grim Bunny/Pet Projects

programme.title: Arthur: How The Cookie Crumbles/Sue Ellen's Littler Sister
programme.desc: What's a budding entrepreneur to do when her homemade cookies hit the big time? Especially when the recipe isn't really hers? Then, Arthur and Francine would love to lend their sisters to Sue Ellen, who's sick of being an only child.
programme.sub-title: How The Cookie Crumbles/Sue Ellen's Littler Sister

programme.title: Arthur: The Great MacGrady, Parts 1 & 2
programme.desc: When Mrs. MacGrady is diagnosed with cancer, Arthur and his friends all react differently to the news. The kids must learn how to come together to help support each other and Mrs. MacGrady.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Pet Business/D.W. The Copycat
programme.desc: How can Arthur prove to his parents that he's responsible enough to take care of his very own puppy? "Get a job," suggests D.W.!. Yet another personality change for D.W., who's decided that from now on, she'll be just like Arthur.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Makes Waves/It Came From Beyond
programme.desc: With the community pool closed for repairs and the temperature on the rise, Arthur and D.W. need a place to keep cool. Then, Grandma Thora takes in a stray: an adorable little dog named...Killer?
programme.sub-title: Arthur Makes Waves/It Came From Beyond

programme.title: Arthur: Fern's Flights of Fancy/Cereal
programme.desc: Will Fern give up her dreams of being a writer just because of one silly rejection? Buster tells the story of a missing cereal box on his all-new podcast. Will he be able to find the thief--and in the process--the truth?

programme.title: Arthur: Grandma Thora Appreciation Day/Fern's Slumber Party
programme.desc: Arthur and D.W. are planning a surprise party for Grandma Thora. But amidst the party-planning mayhem, they forget about the guest of honor! Then, shy Fern hosts a slumber party at her mother's urging.
programme.sub-title: Grandma Thora Appreciation Day/Fern's Slumber Party

programme.title: Arthur: Brain's Brain/Brain Sees Stars
programme.desc: Brain's Easter egg hunts are notoriously hard. But this year's might prove impossible if Brain can't remember where he hid the final egg. Then, crazy coincidences have prevented Brain from seeing a meteor shower in person.

programme.title: Arthur: Castles in the Sky/Tipping the Scales
programme.desc: The gang is devastated after their tree house collapses. Can architect Frank Gehry help them to rebuild? Everyone in Arthur's chorus group is excited about their upcoming performance in Crown City.
programme.sub-title: Castles in the Sky/Tipping the Scales

programme.title: Arthur: Buster Isn't Buying It/One Ornery Critter
programme.desc: Aliens, conspiracy theories, the megatoad--Buster believes in everything, until his favorite show gets cancelled for false reporting. Dogs love Arthur! Well, except Carrot Cake. Can Arthur win over this picky pup?
programme.sub-title: Buster Isn't Buying It/One Ornery Critter

programme.title: Arthur: Buster's Second Chance/Arthur and the Whole Truth
programme.desc: With the help of a little time travel, Buster turns back the clock to see what his life would be like if he were a genius. Arthur isn't happy when he discovers that Buster has been telling him some white lies, just to spare his feelings.
programme.sub-title: Buster's Second Chance/Arthur and the Whole Truth

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Writes A Story/Arthur's Lost Dog
programme.desc: Struggling with a school assignment, Arthur decides that his regular life is just too boring to write about. And, Arthur is the only one who believes in the superior intelligence of his dog. But even Arthur gets confused when Pal runs away.
programme.sub-title: Arthur Writes A Story/Arthur's Lost Dog

programme.title: Arthur: Whip. Mix. Blend./Staycation
programme.desc: When Rattles's mom starts dating Archie Vanderloo, Rattles finds himself spending time with his twins, but they don’t have anything in common. Arthur offers to babysit so that his parents can enjoy some peace and quiet in the backyard.

programme.title: Arthur: The Good Sport/Crushed
programme.desc: When the Athlete of the Year Award doesn't go to Francine, she makes no effort to hide her hurt feelings from the recipient. Arthur can't believe his parents are hiring a babysitter--he's 8 years old, and babysitters are b-o-r-i-n-g!

programme.title: Arthur: Speak Up Francine/Waiting for Snow
programme.desc: The local creek is polluted and pesticide run-off is to blame. Francine is determined to get the word out at the annual Earth Day rally. Ladonna can't wait to experience her first blizzard, if only the weather would cooperate.

programme.title: Arthur: Baby Kate and the Imaginary Mystery/Strangers on a Train
programme.desc: Nadine, D.W.'s imaginary friend is missing. Sue Ellen can't wait to travel on an old-fashioned train, but once onboard, she discovers that the train is not as spectacular as she had hoped–until she finds a mysterious diary.
programme.sub-title: Baby Kate and the Imaginary Mystery/Strangers on a Train

programme.title: Arthur: When Carl Met George/D.W. Swims with the Fishes
programme.desc: George is excited about his new friend, Carl. Then George learns that Carl has Asperger's Syndrome – can they remain good friends? D.W. and James enter the pre-school swim meet and recruit their big siblings to coach them.
programme.sub-title: When Carl Met George/D.W. Swims with the Fishes

programme.title: Arthur: The Boy Who Cried Comet/Arthur and Los Vecinos
programme.desc: Buster is convinced that he's seen real UFO's, and he uses Muffy's fancy new telescope to get the proof. Then, Mr. Sipple from next door is moving away and Arthur wonders--who will be the new neighbors?
programme.sub-title: The Boy Who Cried Comet/Arthur and Los Vecinos

programme.title: Arthur: Opposites Distract/Just the Ticket
programme.desc: Arthur and Buster have always been best friends, but when a leaky roof forces Arthur to study in Buster's room, they discover that they make better friends than roommates. Arthur's ecstatic when he wins free concert tickets on the radio.

programme.title: Arthur: The Chips Are Down/Revenge Of The Chip
programme.desc: What a mysterious, beautiful thing a green potato chip is--and D.W. just ate a gigantic one! But then she hears a rumor that they're poisonous...Sure, kids do some pretty embarrassing things, but do Moms have to tell everyone?
programme.sub-title: The Chips Are Down/Revenge Of The Chip

programme.title: Arthur: Lost!/The Short, Quick Summer
programme.desc: One day, Arthur falls asleep on a bus and awakens in a strange part of town. Will he ever find his way home? Can he keep himself from crying? Next, summer vacation is over? What about all those great, fun things Arthur intended to do?

programme.title: Arthur: Francine's Cleats of Strength/Little Miss Meanie
programme.desc: When Francine needs money for new soccer cleats, Muffy hires her as a personal assistant. Lydia and Muffy join forces to defeat a mean beauty queen in the Little Miss Crocus" pageant.
programme.sub-title: Francine's Cleats of Strength/Little Miss Meanie

programme.title: Arthur: The Director's Cut/Crime and Consequences
programme.desc: After meeting his hero, Hollywood director Tufton Sinclair, George is inspired to make a movie of his own. When George accidentally breaks the class's prize woodworking project, Binky gets unfairly blamed.

programme.title: Arthur: MacFrensky/The Good The Bad and the Binky
programme.desc: Cheating comes in to play when Francine and Brain are locked in a stiff competition to win student of the month. Babysitter Binky introduces his charge to the world of pro-wrestling, but is he being a good role model?
programme.sub-title: MacFrensky/The Good The Bad and the Binky

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Babysits/Arthur's Cousin Catastrophe
programme.desc: You think running a marathon is hard? Try babysitting for the Terrible Tibble Twins. Next, Arthur's family is hosting the once-a-year-is-more-than-enough family reunion. But a major thunderstorm turns this into a reunion to remember.

programme.title: Arthur: I Wanna Hold Your Hand/Whistling in the Wind
programme.desc: During a shopping trip to the mall, Binky gets caught doing the uncoolest of all the uncool things in the world--holding his mom's hand! If the Tibbles are supposed to be exactly the same, why can Tommy whistle while Timmy can't?
programme.sub-title: I Wanna Hold Your Hand/Whistling in the Wind

programme.title: Arthur: The Cherry Tree/Matchmaker Matchbreaker
programme.desc: Muffy wants a Bouncy Castle at her party, but when her favorite cherry tree is cut down to make room for it, she starts to have regrets. Francine and Muffy scheme to set up their older siblings Chip and Catherine, but plans go awry.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Tooth/D.W. Gets Lost
programme.desc: It's bad enough to wear glasses all the time. But does Arthur have to be the last person in his class to lose his baby teeth? Then, if you think being lost in a humongous department store would scare a four-year-old, think again.

programme.title: Arthur: Buster's Green Thumb/My Fair Tommy
programme.desc: Buster finds out that his collection of old food makes excellent compost--which makes for even better tomatoes! Then, neither of the Tibble twins has ever won the coveted "Good Behavior of the Week" cupcake award.

programme.title: Arthur: D.W. Tale Spins/Prunella Gets It Twice
programme.desc: What happens when you combine Greek Mythology with D.W.'s imagination? Then, getting two Polly Locket dolls almost ruins Prunella's birthday party. That, and Francine's bad mood--why, she wouldn't even sing the Happy Birthday song!
programme.sub-title: D.W. Tale Spins/Prunella Gets It Twice

programme.title: Arthur: Binky Barnes, Art Expert/Arthur's Lucky Pencil
programme.desc: It's a nightmare--Arthur and Buster have to work with Binky. On an art project! I mean, what does a bully like Binky know about art? Then, Arthur discovers the secret to success--a pencil that brings good luck to whoever possesses it.
programme.sub-title: Binky Barnes, Art Expert/Arthur's Lucky Pencil

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Weighs In/The Law of the Jungle Gym
programme.desc: When Arthur doesn't fit into his costume for the play, he's shocked to learn that he's gotten "husky-sized." He gets serious about getting in shape. Muffy found the perfect place to take pictures with her new digital camera: the jungle gym.
programme.sub-title: Arthur Weighs In/The Law of the Jungle Gym

programme.title: How Britain Won WW2
programme.desc: Hidden events that changed the course of World War II.

programme.title: VE Day - Forever in their Debt
programme.desc: Tells the stories of those who experienced the end of the war in all its many forms. It features a wide range of interviews from children who remember the street parties, to the servicemen who remember not having to buy a single drink that day.

programme.title: Hitler Uncovering His Fatal Obsession: Barbarossa Unleased 1941
programme.desc: E1 begins with a brief examination of the rationale of hatred projected by Hitler onto the Soviet-Slavic-Jewish world. Then it leaps forward, to see Hitler initiate an invasion of the USSR.

programme.title: Hitler Uncovering His Fatal Obsession: Time is Blood 1942-5
programme.desc: Episode 2 begins after the desperate German winter of 1941. Yet 1942 began badly for the Soviets, with more vicious Nazi campaigning seeing millions more Russians captured and starved.

programme.title: Hitler and Stalin: A Secret Relationship: Mistrust and Mutual Fascination
programme.desc: We have long ignored the "intimate" relationship between Hitler and Stalin, this mixture of mistrust and mutual fascination.

programme.title: Hitler and Stalin: A Secret Relationship: Two Tyrants
programme.desc: With the German-Soviet pact, Stalin and Hitler put aside all political logic to let the Western democracies believe that such a rapprochement was impossible.

programme.title: Hitler's Propaganda Machine: Building The Brand
programme.desc: Hitler’s fascination with propaganda was born in the trenches of the First World War. There he saw it emerge as a potent tool of psychological warfare - one that he would harness to build the Nazi movement. Witness Hitler's early propaganda tactics.

programme.title: Hitler's Propaganda Machine: Power and Persuasion
programme.desc: This episode explores Hitler's approach to propaganda in power; where persuasion was achieved through propaganda and terror, all in service of one goal: the creation of a state under one shared ideology. A new German power fueled by propaganda.

programme.title: Hitler's Propaganda Machine: Why We Fight
programme.desc: This episode explores the way Hitler used propaganda to justify his warmongering, reframing it as defense of Germany’s people and borders. It investigates the role propaganda played for both Hitler and the Allies to mobilize their countries for war.

programme.title: The Battle of Britain: 3 Days that Saved the Nation: The Few
programme.desc: The 15th August 1940, the day the Battle of Britain started in earnest.

programme.title: The Battle of Britain: 3 Days that Saved the Nation: The Darkest Hour
programme.desc: The 30th August 1940 - the most intense day of fighting.

programme.title: The Battle of Britain: 3 Days that Saved the Nation: The Blitz
programme.desc: The 15th September 1940 - Battle of Britain day.

programme.title: Nazi Hunters: Herbert Cukurs
programme.desc: Nazi Hunters examines how Israeli secret service agents traveled to South America to assassinate Nazi war criminal Herbert Cukurs. Known as the Hangman of Riga, Cukurs was responsible for the deaths of over 30,000 Latvian Jews.

programme.title: Nazi Hunters: Adolf Eichmann
programme.desc: Nazi Hunters examines the capture of Adolf Eichmann considered by many to be one of the main architects of the Holocaust. Eichmann was captured outside of his home near Buenos Aires in Argentina by Mossad agents.

programme.title: Nazi Hunters: Klaus Barbie
programme.desc: Nazi Hunters looks at how the husband and wife team of Serge and Beate Klarsfeld worked tirelessly to have Nazi war criminal Klaus Barbie extradited from Bolvia to stand trail in France.

programme.title: Nazi Hunters: Erich Priebke
programme.desc: Nazi Hunters examines how, a half-century after the war, American journalists track down former Gestapo officer Erich Priebke. Priebke who was responsible for some of Italy's worst atrocities fled to Argentina after the war.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Miracle & Javonni
programme.desc: Smart, single mum Miracle fell for Javonni, a dreamy-eyed Instagrammer. With Max on hiatus, Nev teams up with TV personality Charlamagne to take Miracle on a hunt for the man of her dreams.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Whitney & Bre
programme.desc: Whitney met Brenell on a LGBT website four years ago and is head-over-heels in love. Brenell refuses to video chat with her, and Whitney is desperate to know why. Nev and Max investigate.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Daisy & Marcus
programme.desc: Daisy met Marcus on Instagram and he instantly stole her heart. But Marcus won't speak to Daisy on the phone, let alone meet her in person, so Nev and Tyler try to arrange a face to face.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Rod & Ebony
programme.desc: Rod met Ebony on a dating web site four years ago, now it's time for the two to meet in person. Is Ebony who she says she is? What will happen when they meet in real life for the first time? (S1, ep9)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Courtney & Isaak
programme.desc: Courtney broke up with Isaak, who she met online. He's doing everything to get her back. Beauty queen Cassidy Wolf joins Nev to get Isaak to leave Courtney alone for good.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Chitara & Priscilla
programme.desc: Chitara took a big leap and came out to her family when she met Priscilla online, but Priscilla ended their relationship unexpectedly. Now Chitara is determined to find out what happened.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Lauren & Derek
programme.desc: Lauren met Derek online years ago. Derek is caring, supporting Lauren after she had a baby with a former boyfriend. Lauren thinks Derek could be the one, so why has he avoided meeting her? (S2, ep4)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Lauren & Derek
programme.desc: Lauren met Derek online years ago. Derek is caring, supporting Lauren after she had a baby with a former boyfriend. Lauren thinks Derek could be the one, so why has he avoided meeting her?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Aaliyah & Alicia
programme.desc: Aaliyah has been able to share her life struggles with Alicia. However, despite living only 70 blocks away, Alicia refuses to meet her as she hasn't come out to her friends and family yet.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Jesse & Brian
programme.desc: Jesse met Brian online. They made plans to meet, but Brian stood her up. Now, years later, Brian has asked her to live with him. But, she can't stop wondering - what is Brian hiding?

programme.title: Catfish UK: Taylor & Brad
programme.desc: Taylor is falling in love with Brad despite never having seen his face. Can Oobah and Nella find the man of her dreams, and will Taylor get her happy ever after? (S2, ep6)

programme.title: Catfish UK: Mario & Hannah
programme.desc: After turning his life around, Mario met his soulmate, Hannah. But she refuses to speak on the phone and won't meet in person. Julie and Oobah try to find out who his dream girl really is. (S1, ep7)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Harold & Armani
programme.desc: Harold found his match with a beautiful fellow jock named Armani. Although they live in the same area, they've never met. Nev is joined by Angel Haze to help Harold get his perfect girl. (S4, ep3)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Jamey and Ari
programme.desc: Jamey fell for Ari online, and he will do anything to meet her, but she will only do it on TV! Nev and Max help Ari share her story, and she hopes Jamey will accept her as she is. (S4, ep8)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Solana & Elijah
programme.desc: Solana is in a relationship with Danny but can't stop thinking about her online love Elijah. His photos were used in so many profiles that she has to know is this the real Elijah?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Rod & Ebony
programme.desc: Rod met Ebony on a dating web site four years ago, now it's time for the two to meet in person. Is Ebony who she says she is? What will happen when they meet in real life for the first time?

programme.title: Catfish UK: Hayley & Alex
programme.desc: Oobah is joined by Catfish US royalty Kamie to help Hayley finally meet Alex. But after five months of avoiding phone calls and cancelling on her, will she get her a fairy tale ending? (S2, ep4)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Hundra & Emily
programme.desc: Hundra never planned on falling in love with a girl and is risking coming out on national TV to learn if her love is for real. Nev investigates to reveal a shocking Catfish. (S4, ep17)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Artis & Jess
programme.desc: Five months ago Artis met Jess online. Artis and Jess each were in relationships, but believed they'd found true love. But is Jess everything that she says she is?

programme.title: Catfish UK: Luke & Amy
programme.desc: Drummer Luke first started talking to nurse Amy when she came to one of his gigs 6 months ago. They had an instant spark but unfortunately every time they try and meet she cancels. (S2, ep9)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Antoinette & Albert
programme.desc: A year after meeting 'T-lights' on Instagram, 'instaceleb' Antoinette is ready to meet him, but he always brushes off the idea. Is he really the online celebrity he claims to be?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Nick & Melissa
programme.desc: Nick and Melissa fell in love at age 12 when they met on an online chat room. Now 18, Nick is ready to meet Melissa. But is Melissa the real deal or has Nick been entangled in lies?

programme.title: NEW EPISODES Celebrity Ex on the Beach: Breaking Point
programme.desc: Seeing Joey and Lorena all over each other is too much for Ellie. Lateysha gets pied by Michael but a sexy new celebrity leaves her on cloud nine. Calum and Marisa continue to flirt.

programme.title: NEW EPISODES Celebrity Ex on the Beach: Will You Be My Girlfriend?
programme.desc: Calum is caught between two exes - Marissa and new arrival Victoria. Marissa is not happy. Joey has a big question for Lorena and Ashley gets friendzoned.

programme.title: NEW EPISODES Celebrity Ex on the Beach: May The Best Man Win
programme.desc: Joey and Lorena are official but someone threatens their happiness. David gets cold feet with Lateysha. Ashley has some luck and Michael and Victoria get closer.

programme.title: NEW EPISODES Celebrity Ex on the Beach: Head To Head
programme.desc: Itay finally realises he's lost the battle for Lorena. Ashley gets pied by Georgia. Ellie gets an apology she's been longing for and the Tablet Of Terror dishes up double trouble.

programme.title: NEW EPISODES Celebrity Ex on the Beach
programme.desc: There's a special celebrity arrival at the boat party. Georgia realises she's made a mistake, and one of Itay and Victoria's time comes to an end.

programme.title: NEW EPISODES Celebrity Ex on the Beach
programme.desc: Lateysha and David hit the rocks when reality queen Tiffany Pollard arrives causing drama by exposing David's true feelings towards Lateysha. Two exes leave the villa for good.

programme.title: NEW EPISODES Celebrity Ex on the Beach
programme.desc: Emotions run high as Victoria is torn between Michael and a new arrival. Lateysha explodes when Marissa flirts with David, and Joey performs a romantic rap for Lorena.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 201
programme.desc: Yohamna is in love with her best friend James. Joe can't wait to let his best friend Lacey know he has feelings for her.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 202
programme.desc: Cassie is set on telling her best friend Sean she has a crush on him. Nyk is ready to reveal to her best friend Katie how much she likes her.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 203
programme.desc: Antonio will tell his long time friend, Megan, that he loves her. Stormy has to let her gay best friend know that she thinks they have something special.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 204
programme.desc: Jojo reveals that he loves his best friend, Sydney. Kristen wants to let her best friend Jeremiah know that she has a crush on him.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 205
programme.desc: Nicole is nervous to tell her best friend Tom that she likes him. Agape is finally ready to confess her true feelings to her friend Jen.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 206
programme.desc: Timing is right for Spenser to reveal his feelings to his best friend Blanca. Nazzy is scared to reveal her crush on her best friend Joel.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 207
programme.desc: Amy tells her study partner and best friend that she's in love. Tonee wants to come clean with his feelings for his best friend Ryan.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 208
programme.desc: Caiti needs to tell her best friend Kevin that she likes him. Jarvis wants to date his best friend Naz.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 209
programme.desc: Ryan's is crushing on his best friend Taylor and must let her know. Ashley wonders if she should tell her friend, Colin, that she has feelings for him.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 210
programme.desc: DJ Danny tells his best friend Sabra about his true feelings. Travis reveals his secret crush to his best friend Kelly.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 211
programme.desc: Hairdresser Luna must hell his best friend Lola how much he likes her. Carleen is readu to let Jessica know her true feelings.

programme.title: The Hills: Everything Happens for a Reason
programme.desc: Spencer's flirtation leads Heidi home to Colorado, where she reconnects with her high school boyfriend. Lauren gives Stephanie a piece of her mind for inviting Heidi to her party. (S5, ep2)

programme.title: The Hills: I'm Done With You
programme.desc: Heidi catches Spencer at a nightclub with Stacie the bartender and demands they go to couples therapy. Lauren puts her reputation on the line when she gets Stephanie an internship. (S5, ep3)

programme.title: The Hills: Crazy In Love
programme.desc: Audrina tries to get over Justin by setting her sights on Brody. Heidi drags Spencer to couples therapy. Stephanie screws up at People's Revolution, so Lauren threatens to fire her. (S5, ep4)

programme.title: The Hills: I Always Had A Little Crush
programme.desc: Audrina hooks up with Brody when the girls crash the boys' surf trip to Hawaii. Heidi's virgin ex-boyfriend comes to visit, and she hopes some of his values will rub off on Spencer. (S5, ep5)
programme.sub-title: I Always Had A Little Crush

programme.title: The Hills: Playmates Bring the Drama
programme.desc: Audrina's heartbroken as Brody's girlfriend confronts her about Hawaii, and Brody does nothing to stop it. Heidi sees a text message from Stacie to Spencer and confronts her in a club. (S5, ep6)

programme.title: The Hills: Keep Your Enemies Closer
programme.desc: Justin confronts Audrina about hooking up with Brody. Stephanie ruins a photo shoot at work, and Lauren will have to answer to Kelly. Heidi warns Stacie to stay out of her life. (S5, ep7)

programme.title: The Hills: Father of The Bride
programme.desc: Spencer tries to save his and Heidi's relationship by asking her dad's permission to marry her. Lauren must fire Stephanie, who's heartbroken, as the guy she likes has a girlfriend. (S5, ep8)

programme.title: The Hills: Hi Lauren, It's Spencer
programme.desc: Lauren thinks twice about going to Heidi's wedding after Spencer finally apologises. Brody refuses to risk his relationship with Jayde to save his friendship with Audrina. (S5, ep9)

programme.title: The City: If She Can Make It Here...
programme.desc: Whitney arrives in New York City during fashion week just in time to start her new career with iconic designer, Diane Von Furstenberg. (S1, ep1)
programme.sub-title: If She Can Make It Here...

programme.title: The City: The Truth Will Reveal Itself
programme.desc: Whitney's world is turned upside-down when a boy from her past shows up to warn her that Jay has been fooling around. Olivia decides that befriending Whitney is her new project. (S1, ep2)

programme.title: The City: The L Word
programme.desc: Whitney gets mixed signals from Jay and decides to ask him directly where she stands. Erin's new boyfriend comes to visit and Whitney realizes it's time to find her own apartment. (S1, ep3)

programme.title: The City: Good Things Come In Threes
programme.desc: Whitney dates a new guy and Jay confesses to Adam his true feelings about Whitney. (S1, ep4)

programme.title: The City: Boys Night Out
programme.desc: Adam lets loose while his girlfriend Allie is out of town, but when she hears he kissed another girl from Whitney and the others, Adam finds himself in hot water. (S1, ep5)

programme.title: The City: He Never Said He Had a Girlfriend
programme.desc: Allie breaks down after a run in with the girl who claims she kissed Adam, but Adam sticks to his story to win Allie back, and Whitney gets upset with Jay for taking Adam's side. (S1, ep6)
programme.sub-title: He Never Said He Had a Girlfriend

programme.title: The City: The Truth Hurts
programme.desc: Kelly Cutrone accuses Allie of being too skinny, and Whitney finds herself caught in the middle. Erin runs into an ex-boyfriend and old feelings begin to return. (S1, ep7)

programme.title: The Hills: Season Finale
programme.desc: In Lauren's final episode, she must decide if she'll forgive Spencer and go to the wedding. The drama in the pews beats that at the altar, until a surprise guest shocks everyone! (S5, ep10)

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: When a 17-year-old girl breaks up with her abusive boyfriend, he snaps and breaks into her bedroom to attack her.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: The investigation into the shooting death of retired NYPD officer Patrick Gilhuley, including interviews with jury members and a deconstruction of forensic evidence.

programme.title: 48 Hours: A Bad Bet
programme.desc: A bookie comes under suspicion when his wife is killed.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Secrets of Waco
programme.desc: The 25th anniversary of the deadly standoff in Waco, Texas; a retired United Parcel Service driver reveals his experiences with cult leader David Koresh; a former ATF agent tells about his involvement.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Live To Tell: River's Edge
programme.desc: On January 8, 2000, college students Danielle Keener and Dan Zapp were on a date, walking along a river’s edge outside York, Pennsylvania, when they were kidnapped at gunpoint by a man in a pick-up truck.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Power and Passion
programme.desc: 48 Hours probes case of Alabama politician Stephen Nodine -- accused in the 2010 shooting death of his mistress, Angel Downs.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Getting Away with Murder?
programme.desc: A report on families who have experienced the violent death of a loved one and believe they know the identity of the killer but lack evidence to back the charge.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: The investigation into the death of a woman's husband reveals he is not the first man she married who died under suspicious circumstances.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: A New York dentist denies killing his lover's husband -- who was also his best friend.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: New information in the case of a woman accused of killing her fiance during a kayaking trip may prove her innocence.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: A report on the 2009 death of Rhonda Casto, who went hiking in Oregon’s Columbia River Gorge with her boyfriend, Stephen Nichols, and she never returned home.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Burden of Proof
programme.desc: Following the disappearance, in Jan. 1997, of 33-year-old Beverly Watson, her husband, Jim, became a prime suspect. Watson insisted that he was innocent. Police noticed that Jim was wearing makeup to conceal what appeared to be scratches on his face.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Murder by Design
programme.desc: Investigators question whether designer Gianni Versace was the random victim of a killing spree, or he knew the man who shot him to death.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Law and Mrs. Shelton
programme.desc: A report on Catherine Mehaffey Shelton, a criminal defense attorney from Dallas. She has been practicing law in Texas for nearly three decades and making headlines for nearly as long, primarily because strange things happen to the men in her life.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Walking Free
programme.desc: The story of David Camm, who was convicted in two murder trials -- each eventually overturned -- and was found not guilty in his third trial for the murder of his wife and two children.

programme.title: 48 Hours: OJ Simpson: Endgame
programme.desc: The OJ Simpson trial for the murder of Nicole Brown Simpson and Ron Goldman, the controversy that surrounded it, the impact it had on race relations, including the current and recent uproar over race, patriotism, and free speech in America.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Two Wigs, A Gun, and A Murder: Part 2
programme.desc: Fred Jablin, a devoted father was gunned down in his driveway. His ex-wife, Piper was the prime suspect. Circumstantial evidence, including an airline ticket and two wigs indicated that Piper had masqueraded as her older sister and killed her husband.
programme.sub-title: Two Wigs, A Gun, and A Murder: Part 2

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Devil's Twin
programme.desc: Identical twin brothers suspected of committing a murder after studying a crime show on TV.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Mystery of Slide Mountain
programme.desc: A report that examines evidence and unanswered questions regarding a June 1, 1998 auto accident on Slide Mountain, near Reno, Nevada, that led to the death of Rinette Riella Bergna and left the driver, Rinette’s husband Peter with only minor injuries.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Soldier's Wife
programme.desc: A soldier claims the fatal shot he fired into the back of his young wife's head was an accident, but prosecutors say he did it intentionally in a fit of jealousy.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Floyd wants to do the show but Jon’s is the scheduled guest.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Penelope falls for a hipper cat until Garfield learns to rock and roll.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Squeak Previews/U.S Acres: Dr. Jekyll & Mr. Wade/A Tall Tale
programme.desc: Two mice critics review a documentary./Wade is mistakenly hypnotized to turn into a monster./The network insists that Nermal tell a story.
programme.sub-title: Squeak Previews/U.S Acres: Dr. Jekyll & Mr. Wade/A Tall Tale

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Pest of a Guest/Impractical Joker/Fat and Furry

programme.sub-title: Pest of a Guest/Impractical Joker/Fat and Furry

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Robodie/No Laughing Matter/The Attach of the Mutant Guppies
programme.desc: A mad scientist uses Odie as a model for a line of robot dogs./Aliens who have come to steal Earth's laughter./Garfield teases Nermal about giant mutant guppies.
programme.sub-title: Robodie/No Laughing Matter/The Attach of the Mutant Guppies

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Stick To It/Orson In Wonderland/For Cats Only
programme.desc: Garfield tells Odie to stay in one spot./During a croquet game Orson finds a large hole./Garfield hosts a special, on KAT TV.
programme.sub-title: Stick To It/Orson In Wonderland/For Cats Only

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: TV of Tomorrow/Little Red Riding Egg/The Well Fed Feline
programme.desc: Jon buys a new TV set when his old one breaks./Orson decides to make his own movie./Animal activist thinks Garfield is starving.
programme.sub-title: TV of Tomorrow/Little Red Riding Egg/The Well Fed Feline

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Hound of the Arbuckles/Read Alert/Urban Arbuckle
programme.desc: Garfield imagines he's a cunning Dr. Watson./As Orson looks through his books./Cactus Jake suggest that Jon try dating Cactus Jackie.
programme.sub-title: Hound of the Arbuckles/Read Alert/Urban Arbuckle

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Garfield discovers a plot by washing machines to conquer the world. Roy opens a fast food restaurant.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Mistakes Will Happen/The Well Dweller/The Wise Man
programme.desc: Garfield addresses viewers comments./Orson drills a well for water./Jon follows the advice of a Wise man.
programme.sub-title: Mistakes Will Happen/The Well Dweller/The Wise Man

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Garfield gets free pizza. Jon’s new car falls in love with him.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: One Good Fern Deserves Another/The Goodie-Go-Round/Health Feud
programme.desc: Jon mistakenly buys a man-eating fern./Orson tries to get a record player for Bo./Jon becomes a health and exercise nut.
programme.sub-title: One Good Fern Deserves Another/The Goodie-Go-Round/Health Feud

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Garfield is bitten by the video game bug. Orson dreams he’s double-Oh Orson again.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Mr. Swindler returns and gets Jon to sell the house for $1. Wade’s forgetful cousin arrives.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Garfield tests the audience. Orson offers his version of “The Rooser.”

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: The Curse of Klopman/Mud Sweet Mud/Rainy Day Dreams
programme.desc: Garfield inherits the cursed diamond./The farm folk decide to clean up the place, Orson's waller becomes a prime objective./While Jon hosts a lady friend on a rainy day.
programme.sub-title: The Curse of Klopman/Mud Sweet Mud/Rainy Day Dreams

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: The Pizza Patrol/U.S Acres: The Son Also Rises/Rolling Romance
programme.desc: Garfield tries to get free pizza./Wade's father comes to the farm./Jon's new car falls in love with him.
programme.sub-title: The Pizza Patrol/U.S Acres: The Son Also Rises/Rolling Romance

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Arrivaderci, Odie/Gort Goes Good/Feeling Feline
programme.desc: Garfield becomes guilt ridden when he believes he has caused Jon to get rid of Odie./One of Orson's older brothers decides to turn honest./Jon thinks he's acting too much like Garfield.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: The Binky Show/U.S. Acres: Keeping Cool/Don't Move!
programme.desc: Garfield decides to win Jon a birthday present on a game show./When Orson's brothers come to torment him./Odie must remain outside a pet store.
programme.sub-title: The Binky Show/U.S. Acres: Keeping Cool/Don't Move!

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Invasion of the Big Robots/Shelf-Esteem/Housebreak Hotel
programme.desc: Garfield wakes up to discover he's in the wrong cartoon./Orson can't pick up a book without reading it./Garfield and Odie stay in a ritzy pet hotel.
programme.sub-title: Invasion of the Big Robots/Shelf-Esteem/Housebreak Hotel

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Maine Couse/First Aid Wade/Video Victim
programme.desc: The gang decide to keep a live lobster as a pet./Wade believes Orson and Roy are going to operate on his leg./Jon bets Garfield he can't go without TV for 24 hours.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: First Class Feline/Hamelot/How to be funny
programme.desc: Garfield's plan to send Nermal to Abu Dhabi fails./Orson dreams about the knights of the round table./Garfield lectures on what humor is.
programme.sub-title: First Class Feline/Hamelot/How to be funny

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: The Bear Facts/Nothing To Be Afraid/The Big Talker
programme.desc: Garfield runs into a bear and Binky./The crew try to find one item that Wade will not be afraid of./Garfield makes a local talk show host regret his anti-cat comments.
programme.sub-title: The Bear Facts/Nothing To Be Afraid/The Big Talker

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Garfield and Odie go sailing on Jon’s new boat and a shark shows up. Michael can’t scare anyone until he enters the farmyard.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Dr. Bean tries again to use Odie as the basis for robot dogs. Orson dreams he’s Power Pig.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: China Cat/Cock-A-Doodle Dandy/Beach Blanket Bonzo
programme.desc: Jon and Garfield hear the story of the dragon and the cat./Roy's Morning bugle keeps waking up an angry bear./Garfield's attempt at a beach romance are hindered.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Legend of the Lake/Double-Oh Orson/The Black Book
programme.desc: Garfield lectures a group about a famous water voyage./Orson imagines himself a famous secret agent./Jon gives Garfield his "little black book" to hide.
programme.sub-title: Legend of the Lake/Double-Oh Orson/The Black Book

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Twice Told Tale/Orson Goes on Vacation/Wedding Bell Blues
programme.desc: Jon and Garfield's house gets filled with yogurt./Orson goes away and leaves Wade in charge./Garfield thinks Jon is getting married and tries to stop a wedding ceremony.
programme.sub-title: Twice Told Tale/Orson Goes on Vacation/Wedding Bell Blues

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Ichabod Cricket shows up to be Garfield’s conscience, and everything backfires.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Cabin Fever/U.S. Acres: Return of Power Pig/Fair Exchange
programme.desc: Garfield and Odie are snowbound in a cabin with no food./A monster circulates around the farm, Orson dons his "Power Pig" togs./Garfield dreams he changes places with Jon.
programme.sub-title: Cabin Fever/U.S. Acres: Return of Power Pig/Fair Exchange

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Nighty-Nightmare/U.S Acres: Banana Nose/Ode to Odie

programme.sub-title: Nighty-Nightmare/U.S Acres: Banana Nose/Ode to Odie

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Pros and Cons/Rooster Revenge/Lights! Camera! Garfield!
